Title: Botanical Wreath Tote Bag - Natural Linen Canvas Tote
Description:
Bring a touch of nature to your everyday carry with this beautiful botanical tote bag. Featuring a delicate line art drawing of foliage, this bag is perfect for adding a gentle, organic touch to any outfit or space.

Crafted from high-quality, durable canvas linen, this tote is designed for versatility and style. Its natural, earthy tone makes it an ideal sustainable alternative to plastic bags.

  • Material: Durable, breathable canvas linen, perfect for everyday use.
  • Design: Minimalist botanical print, suitable for gifting or personal use.
  • Capacity: Generous size to hold books, groceries, makeup, or gym essentials.
  • Care: Machine washable for lasting beauty.

This tote is an excellent choice for market trips, book hauls, beach days, or as a stylish, eco-friendly gift. The natural texture adds a handmade, artisan feel.
